articles.title: US intercepts and seizes Iranian-flagged cargo ship, Trump says
articles.summary: Tehran has not commented on the incident, which comes as the US prepares for a second round of talks.

articles.title: Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, police say
articles.summary: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting that police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".
